Module org.snmp4j.agent
Package org.snmp4j.agent.request

Interface SnmpSubRequest<S extends SnmpSubRequest<S>>

All Superinterfaces:
SubRequest<S>
All Known Implementing Classes:
SnmpRequest.SnmpSubRequest
public interface SnmpSubRequest<S extends SnmpSubRequest<S>> extends SubRequest<S>
The SnmpSubRequest class holds data for a SNMP sub-request.
Version:
3.0.4
Author:
Frank Fock
